problem: NotebookLM 'Relation-Conditioned Multimodal Learning' (b4be6608-180d-4619-862e-9ddbefa92314) synthesizes SkillLens, LARGER, and Rcml papers. agent-rules had partial overlap (SkillRAE, SkillDAG, Graphify) but lacked SkillLens verifier routing, 4-layer taxonomy enforcement, LARGER-style grep-anchored graph expansion, dual verifier registry, REWRITE proposals, and a training-ready Rcml relation catalog.
solution: Fourth incorporation slice: RELATION_CONDITIONED_MAP; SkillLens harness (taxonomy, verifier gate, RWR); LARGER→Graphify bridge; trajectory→skill_gap; v2 dual registry (agent + verifier) with REWRITE proposals; Rcml relation catalog + JSONL export for future training. Weight training remains out of scope.

user_stories.description: Operator has RELATION_CONDITIONED_MAP.md linking SkillLens, LARGER, and Rcml scope boundaries to repo artifacts.
SKILL_LAYER_TAXONOMY.md maps Policy/Strategy/Procedure/Primitive to rules, pipelines, SKILL_*.md, and MCP.
skill_verifier.py implements ACCEPT/DECOMPOSE/REWRITE/SKIP gate after skill_rerank --dag and before Tier-3 skill body load.
larger_graph_expand.py anchors grep hits to Graphify nodes and returns confidence-filtered neighbor pack; graphify-brain.mdc rule updated.
Trajectory failure hook emits structured gap report consumable by skill_gap_ingest and evolve_dual_registry.
Rcml relation catalog (rcml_relation_registry.json) + classification_hints relation tags; JSONL export for future training; no in-repo weight training.
SkillLens dual registry: verifier_registry.json separate from agent registry; per-skill thresholds and relation boosts.
Gap-driven REWRITE: evolve_dual_registry.py creates proposals; apply-rewrite appends gap-driven amendments to SKILL_*.md (human-gated).

technical_decisions.decision: Rcml (arXiv:2508.17497) weight training is BACKGROUND only — no fine-tuning, attention modules, or contrastive loss implementation in agent-rules.
technical_decisions.rationale: Harness repo adapts interface not weights; rcml_relation_registry.json + JSONL export supply future training corpus.

technical_decisions.decision: Graphify is the LARGER substrate; do not build parallel per-file sidecar JSON unless larger_graph_expand smoke fails.
technical_decisions.rationale: GRAPHIFY_BRAIN_INTEGRATION already ships AST graph + MCP; LARGER adds lexical anchoring semantics.

technical_decisions.decision: SkillLens dual-registry (agent + verifier) implemented in v2: verifier_registry.json + evolve_dual_registry.py; REWRITE is human-gated via apply-rewrite.
technical_decisions.rationale: Separates routing policies from skill catalog; gap reports tighten verifier thresholds without churning registry.json triggers.
technical_decisions.supersedes: v1 decision deferring dual-registry to v2

technical_decisions.decision: Do not reopen prd_geometry_incorporation.json, prd_rag_anatomy_incorporation.json, or prd_skilldag_incorporation.json.
technical_decisions.rationale: All three execution_chain.status complete; this is fourth notebook slice.

technical_decisions.decision: Paper benchmark percentages (SkillLens +6.31pp, LARGER +13.9pp) are LITERATURE_PARTIAL — never CORE in rules.

execution_chain.notes: Ralph ON 2026-06-08 RC-0..RC-9; v2 dual-registry + REWRITE + Rcml export 2026-06-08; pytest test_relation_conditioned + test_dual_registry_rcml 15 passed.

acceptance_smoke.skill_verifier: python 40_operations/scripts/skill_verifier.py --prompt 'meta-analysis forest plot' --json returns ACCEPT or DECOMPOSE with skill id
acceptance_smoke.larger_expand: python 40_operations/scripts/larger_graph_expand.py --grep-hit skill_rerank.py --json returns >=1 neighbor under graphify-out/
acceptance_smoke.rcml_export: python 40_operations/scripts/rcml_export_training.py writes outputs/rcml_training/*.jsonl with >=12 contrastive rows

issues.title: NotebookLM extraction + research gate (3 Q Playwright + arXiv verify)
Wiki concept Relation-conditioned harness + bridge wiki-ingest
skill_rerank RWR channel on skill graph (SkillLens retrieval extension)
